title: Torcherino Community Edition
body:
# Torcherino-ce. This is a community mod for version 1.12.2

## OFICIAL DISCROD - https://discord.gg/jyn2GB9Cuc
### This is a small, simple mod that adds various torches that can be used to increase the tick rates of tile entities.

### Integration mods: TheOneProbe TOP-Addons, JEI, ProjectE, CraftTweaker

### Localization: RU/EU/EN/ZH/GB/US/UA/CN/TW

### The functions are configured in the mod's configuration file, which is called Torcherino.cfg

### A few example uses:
- Growing plants faster
- Smelting ores faster
- Increasing mob spawner speed
